title: Deny git commit --no-verify / -n in src/.claude/settings.json
source_philosophy: ws-trailofbits-settings-json + ws-pixelmojo-hooks-2026 — hooks must be structurally impossible to bypass
change_summary: Added 4 entries to permissions.deny array to block git commit --no-verify and -n flag variations. Closes the bypass gap that previously allowed circumventing the entire hook chain (block-dangerous, pre-commit-branch-check, post-edit-lint, post-edit-test, post-edit-size-check).

gate2.note: harness-report does not measure deny list contents — score unchanged but no regression. Qualitative value: closes hook bypass gap.
